config.info.restart_required: UI language will take effect after the app is restarted.
config.title: 🔧 API Keys Configuration
config.desc: Configure APIs for AI Chat Response and Google TTS
config.note.output_language: 💡 AI output language setting is in the Cohost tab → Language Selector
config.status.api_key_ready: Status: API key ready to test
config.greeting.desc:
AI generates 10 unique greetings every 2 hours using context from the Knowledge tab.
Audio fingerprint rotates automatically safer from TikTok spam detection.
config.greeting.info: Playback interval is set in the Cohost Tab. Greetings refresh automatically every 2 hours.
config.knowledge.desc:
Write here what you sell on live — basket numbers, product names, prices, promos, etc.
The AI will read this and reply to viewer comments based on your products.
config.knowledge.placeholder:
Write what you sell in this live...

Example:
Basket 1 — Red Lipstick 45k
Basket 2 — Foundation 89k
Today's promo: buy 2 get free shipping
config.err.text_empty: Write your product knowledge first before having AI polish it.
config.err.polish_failed:
AI could not process the text right now.
Check your API key or try again.
config.err.context_empty: Context setting is empty. Please fill it in first.
config.msg.context_saved:
✅ Context Setting saved successfully!

The AI will now use the new context.
Changes apply to all subsequent AI replies.
config.confirm.clear_context: Are you sure you want to clear Context Setting?
config.tts.desc: Enter a Google Cloud / Gemini API Key for TTS (one API Key can cover both services)
config.tts.info_gemini: 💡 Gemini Flash TTS: 19 new expressive voices available in the voice picker (Gemini-Puck, Gemini-Kore, etc.)
config.tts.placeholder: Enter Google Cloud / AI Studio API Key...
config.tooltip.detect_key: Auto-detect: AI Studio (Gemini) or Google Cloud (Standard/Chirp3)
config.tts.key_type_undetected: Key type: not detected yet — click Detect
config.tts.key_type_undetected_hint: Key type: not detected yet — click the Detect Type button
config.tts.detect_all: ✅ AI Studio + Cloud TTS — all voices available
config.tts.detect_gemini: ✅ AI Studio key — only Gemini voices are compatible
config.tts.detect_cloud: ✅ Google Cloud key — only Standard & Chirp3 voices
config.tts.detect_none: ❌ Key invalid or has no access to any API
config.tts.info_compat: 💡 AI Studio key → Gemini voices  |  Google Cloud key → Standard & Chirp3
config.tts.status_ready: Status: API Key ready to test
config.tts.status_ok: Status: ✅ API Key valid and TTS working!
config.tts.test_text: Hello! This is a successful TTS voice test.
config.tts.test_failed: TTS failed to run. Check your API Key and quota.
config.status.ready_detail: All VocaLive features can work optimally.
config.status.partial_detail: AI Chat works, TTS needs configuration.
config.status.not_ready_detail: AI API configuration is required to use the app.
config.msg.test_all_empty:
No configuration to test.
Please set the AI API Key and Google TTS API Key first.
config.msg.test_all_done: Connection tests are complete. Check each service's status above.
config.confirm.reset: Are you sure you want to reset all configuration?
config.status.all_reset: Status: All configuration has been reset
config.test.gemini_all_403: ❌ All Gemini models returned 403. Make sure the API key is from Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com)
config.greeting.slot_empty: Slot {slot} is empty. Enter text first.
config.greeting.tts_failed: Failed to play TTS for slot {slot}
config.greeting.slots_min_5:
⚠️ At least 5 greeting slots must be filled to enable the greeting feature.

Currently only {filled} slots are filled.
Please fill in at least {need} more slots.
config.greeting.slots_saved:
✅ Successfully saved {count} filled greeting slots.
Empty slots will be skipped when the system is running.
Timer interval is configured in the Cohost Tab.
config.greeting.confirm_clear_slots: Are you sure you want to clear all greeting slots?
config.greeting.slots_cleared: ✅ All greeting slots have been cleared.
license.dialog.title: VocaLive — License Activation
license.header.subtitle: Enter the email used at purchase
license.hint.email: 💡 Email must match the one used on Lynk.id / Whop at purchase
update.dialog.title: VocaLive — Update Available
update.label.title: Update Available!
update.msg.done:
✅ Update successful!
The app will close. Please open VocaLive manually.
update.err.install_failed: Install failed. Try running as Administrator.
main.window.title: VocaLive v{version}
main.status.up_to_date: ✅ VocaLive v{version} is up to date!
main.update.popup.title: VocaLive — Update Available!
main.update.popup.body:
A new VocaLive version is available!

Your version: v{current}
Latest version: v{latest}

What's new:
{notes}
main.error.recovery_text: An unexpected error occurred, but the app will keep running.
cohost.label.context_info: 📋 Context Setting: Configured via Config Tab → Live Selling Template
cohost.label.trigger_tips: 💡 Tip: Leave empty to reply to all comments. Question mark (?) is auto-replied.
cohost.tooltip.cooldown:
0 = Reply to all comments (good for new streamers)
1-5 = Limit each viewer to 1-5 minutes (good for busy streams)
cohost.tooltip.max_queue:
Number of comments waiting to be replied.
Quiet stream: 5-10 | Busy stream: 15-30
cohost.log.voice_reset: Saved voice '{saved}' not available, reset to: {fallback}
cohost.log.trigger_limit_exceeded: Triggers limited to max 5, excess removed
cohost.log.settings_saved: Settings saved: Triggers={triggers}, Cooldown={cooldown}m, Queue={queue}, GreetingTimer={timer}s
cohost.log.greeting_timer_updated: Greeting timer updated to {seconds} seconds ({minutes} minutes)
cohost.log.start_in_progress: Start already in progress, please wait...
cohost.listener.connected_wait: ✅ Connected! Waiting {seconds}s to skip old history...
cohost.listener.grace_done: ✅ Grace period over — capturing LIVE comments now
cohost.listener.tiktok_not_installed: ❌ TikTokLive library not found. Install with: pip install TikTokLive
